Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Natalie Ann Garcia of POND NORTH LLP (415-217-1240), appearing for defendant / moving party Fraser's Boiler Service, Inc.
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Luther Shaw

RULING:
DEFENDANT FRASER'S BOILER SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Fraser's Boiler Service, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Assuming without deciding that defendant properly showed that it did not own, lease, operate or control any of the shipyards, terminals or ships at issue, defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that such lack of ownership and/or control is fatal to plaintiff's claim for premises owner/contractor liability. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that any exposure to asbestos attributable to it was not a substantial factor in causing or contributing to plaintiff's asbestos-related disease. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Erin F. Robinson of AIKEN WELCH, CSR # 12199 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
